title: helianthemum × pseudocinereum
intro: Helianthemum × pseudocinereum is a hybrid plant species within the rockrose family, resulting from the cross between Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum cinereum. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Helianthemum × pseudocinereum can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
